---
description: "Route Frame changes to the canonical contract and extension procedure"
applyTo: "wandas/frames/**"
---

# Copilot Frame route

Apply the canonical invariants in [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md). For a new or
changed Frame family, public Frame operation, Recipe integration, or related
tests, load
[`wandas-frame-operation-extension`](../../.agents/skills/wandas-frame-operation-extension/SKILL.md).
This file only supplies Copilot path-based routing.
